value.title: Why ServiceNow Stock Gained 9.9%on Friday
value.summary: ServiceNow jumped nearly 10% on Friday while the broader market fell. Here's why.

value.title: Oracle Stock Falls After Report Key Partner OpenAI Could Delay IPO
value.summary: Oracle was among AI stocks that lost ground Friday, following a report that OpenAI is considering delaying its IPO.

value.title: VOO Became the First ETF to Hit $1 Trillion, but Nearly 40% of It Is Now Tech
value.summary: The Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (NYSEARCA:VOO) just became the first exchange-traded fund in history to cross one trillion dollars in assets, a milestone State Street had penciled in as one of its headline 2026 predictions. The interesting part is what investors think they own when they buy VOO versus what is actually sitting inside the ... VOO Became the First ETF to Hit $1 Trillion, but Nearly 40% of It Is Now Tech
